## Want to build a high-performing team of Full stack developers?

Start testing candidates now

## Use our full stack developer test to screen and hire job-fit candidates for roles such as:

Full Stack Web Developer

Full Stack Python Developer

Full Stack Developer- Python/Django

Full Stack ASP.Net Developer

Full Stack Engineer (Python)

Full Stack Java Developer

Entry Level Full Stack .Net Developer

null

null

## Our Full stack developer test questions measures the following Full stack skills of the candidates:

* **Full Stack Web Developer Skills:** CSS3, HTML4, JQuery, Javascript,PHP, Ruby, Node.js, SQLite, etc.
* **Full Stack .Net Development Skills:** Front End Technology Stack, Dependency Injection, Asp.Net Identity, Bootstrap and Web Forms,MS SQL Server 2014 and more.
* **Full Stack Python Development Skills:** Front End Technology Stack, Scripts,Modules,Strings,Build-in-functions,Django and more.
* **Full Stack Java Development Skills:** Strings and Regular Expressions, Template Literals, Burndown Chart,Java 8 Generics and more.

#### Two important use cases for Full stack developer assessment test

**#1 Identifying job-fit candidates based on job roles**

iMocha allows you to create customized Full stack developer tests for any given job role. Using this capability, you can choose questions from various skill types, including functional, technical, and soft skills. For example, with our customized Full stack coding test, you can evaluate candidates' knowledge of CSS3, MS SQL server 14, Bootstrap, Attention to Detail, Leadership and more to hire the best individuals for the job.

**#2 Skill-gap analysis of your employees**

Using this feature, you can measure employees' skill competency through Full stack developer training assessments. It determines the current skill level and identifies the areas for growth. It also measures the knowledge and impact of the training and traces individual employees' gained knowledge. For example, you can use our Full stack developer training assessments to identify a developer’s knowledge about Django, Java 8 Generics, Research skills, PHP, SQLite, and other skills and perform a skill gap analysis.

#### Test Creation Process

We offer various types of Full stack developer coding tests to help you evaluate candidates' specific skills. These questions are designed by Subject Matter Experts (SMEs) based on their knowledge and expertise. For example, only a Full stack developer will develop questions about Ruby, Asp.Net Identity or JavaScript 6 based on easy, medium, and hard difficulty levels.

You can - choose which questions to include in the Full stack developer coding test or ask us to create personalized assessments according to your requirements.

FAQ

How is Full stack Developer test customized?

Down Arrow Circle

Our SMEs can design individualized Full stack Developer assessment tests based on your job role requirements. These assessments are divided into primary and secondary skills, such as a Node.js, Mango DB, Problem Solving, Coding Skills, Webforms, Design Skills, and more. Additionally, SMEs can create customized questions according to applicants' experience and difficulty level.

What are the certifications required for this role?

Down Arrow Circle

Some popular Certifications for Full stack Developer-related job roles are as follows:

‍

• Full Stack Web Developer Nanodegree Certificate

• Professional Certificate in Full Stack Cloud Developer (IBM)

• Full-Stack Web Development with React Specialization Certificate

• Full Stack Development with MERN Certificate

What are the most common interview questions for this role?

Down Arrow Circle

Some of the common Full stack Developer interview questions asked for this role are:

‍

• Explain Pair Programming.

• What is Callback Hell?

• State difference between GraphQL and REST

• What is CI (Continuous Integration)?

• How is GraphQL different from REST?

• What is the Observer pattern?

• What is Long Polling?

• Explain the meaning of multithreading.

• Explain the benefits and drawbacks of using "use strict".

What are the roles and responsibilities of a Full stack Developer?

Down Arrow Circle

Full stack Developers are required to perform the following tasks and responsibilities:

‍

• Create front-end website architecture

• Develop web page user interactions

• Build back-end website applications

• Monitor cross-platform optimization for mobile phones

• Provide sustainable solutions

• Perform responsiveness of applications

• Collaborate with other team members such as graphic designers for web design features

• Create and develop APIs

• Maintain well-functioning database

• Design a plan for stability, scalability, performance optimization, and ongoing improvement.

• Keep track of new development-related tools and frameworks

What are the required skill sets of Full stack Developer?

Down Arrow Circle

You can consider these technical as well as non-technical skills while hiring Full stack Developers:

**Technical Skills:**

• JavaScript

• Node.js

• MongoDB

• PHP

• Java

• Git/GitHib

• JQuery

• Linux

• CSS3

• SQLite

• Front End Technology

• Bootstrap

• Django

• Burndown Chart

• Regular Expression

**Non-Technical Skills:**

• Critical Thinking

• Attention to Details

• Communication

• Interpersonal Skills

• Adaptability

• Time Management

• Leadership

• Research Skills

• Coding Skills

• Database Management

• Design Skills

‍

What is the package of Full stack Developer?

Down Arrow Circle

The average salary of Full stack Developers in the US is $118,841 per year. Full stack developers' salaries start at $97,500 per year.
